note: Visual-only environmental storytelling cues for pixel art. No on-screen text. Guide art and level design.

cues: Scratch-tally marks gouged into the wall beside the bunk — more counts than fit one person
Torn restraint straps still bolted to the chair frame, frayed at the break point
A folded scrap of paper wedged under the bunk — too small to be useful, kept anyway
A guard's helmet resting on a crate, visor cracked from the inside
Parallel scuff marks on the floor — drag marks, not footsteps
Emergency sprinkler head above the vent shaft, caked with rust and never tested

rooms.story_beat: Genetics Lab — CHIMERA evidence, Cross's terminal
cues: Cracked specimen tubes in a rack, amber fluid dried on the shelf below
A lab coat draped over a chair, US flag patch peeled off and left face-down on the counter
Whiteboard covered in equations — a child's crayon drawing taped to one corner, no explanation

rooms.story_beat: Security Wing — heavy guard presence, first full-capability puzzle
cues: A guard station with two coffee cups — one still has condensation on the side
ARGUS camera above every door, lenses polished clean; everything else is dusty
A wall-mounted honor board with PMC names — three are crossed out with black marker

rooms.story_beat: Ventilation Nexus — cat-form duct maze, route to docking bay
cues: A vent grate on the floor bent inward from below — something came up through it, not down
Handwritten 'KEEP SHUT' taped to a duct panel in English and, below it, in Russian
A tool kit open on the floor, one wrench missing from its outline in the foam insert

rooms.story_beat: Genetics Lab overflow — failed CHIMERA subjects
cues: Rows of sealed containment niches lining the walls — most empty, a few with claw marks on the inside of the glass
Medical charts clipped to each niche, subject initials only — no names, no photographs
'CHIMERA SECURE' stamped in red on every drawer and cabinet, ink still vivid
A shuttle with 'EAGLE'S NEST — CIVILIAN RESEARCH' stencilled on the hull, half-scraped off to reveal military markings beneath
Red warning lights casting long overlapping shadows across the bay floor
A US flag bolted to the bulkhead, one corner pulled loose and drifting in the recycled air current
